behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Vividos' dialog, proximity behaviors, and a scripted ritual called the "Ceremony of Eternity" that can be executed to 'send' another character (Lothian) to the Mountain King (Lithos).

Primary gameplay roles: (1) conversation/menu flows that present multiple choices and may trigger the ritual (U8P_VIVIDOS::func21F0 and U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41), (2) the ritual/sequence itself (U8P_VIVIDOS::cast and U8P_VIVIDOS::func01D7) which freezes the avatar, runs camera/SFX, spawns NPCs/effects and invokes a hit/transition, and (3) proximity/behavior utilities (U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule, U8P_VIVIDOS::enterFastArea, U8P_VIVIDOS::leaveFastArea and helpers) that update animation/state and emit flavor barks.

Utilities (U8P_VIVIDOS::func0F9D, U8P_VIVIDOS::func11E4, U8P_VIVIDOS::func1895, U8P_VIVIDOS::func1352, U8P_VIVIDOS::func19CE) coordinate short animations, pathfinding requests and context-sensitive barks based on frames/positions.
notable_control_flow: U8P_VIVIDOS::cast is a process that gates the full ritual on Npc::getTarget(this) == 1; if no target it runs an idle effect loop (spawn FREE::func1C19) controlled by a local counter (local1).

Conversation entry (U8P_VIVIDOS::use / U8P_VIVIDOS::use_1) begins a BeginConversation, branches on flags (vivTold, vividosMet, lothianDead, hasHeart) and delegates to menu builders U8P_VIVIDOS::func21F0 or U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41 which drive multi-stage Ask/SuspendAssign/strcmp conversation loops.

Area enter/leave handlers (U8P_VIVIDOS::enterFastArea / U8P_VIVIDOS::leaveFastArea) reset stored reference slots and conditionally call helpers (U8P_VIVIDOS::func11E4 or U8P_VIVIDOS::func1895) based on vividosSchedule to refresh visual state or speak.

Helpers U8P_VIVIDOS::use spawn + suspend and process_result() to wait for method/process outcomes (e.g., pathfind result) and choose between speaking (U8P_VIVIDOS::func1352/U8P_VIVIDOS::func19CE) or non-verbal actions (METHOD::func15E7) depending on somebodyTalking and pathfinding success.
open_questions: Exact game-state side effects of METHOD::receiveHitWrapper invoked by U8P_VIVIDOS::cast (it appears to produce the sending/transition but the precise health/teleport semantics are not visible).

Which exact global flags persist outside this script (e.g., vividosMet, haveReagents) vs. temporary conversation-state only; caller contexts suggest some are persistent quest flags but not all call sites are shown.
Precise identity and roles of NPCs spawned during the ritual (types passed to Npc::create) and whether they persist or are ephemeral beyond the spawned pid lifetimes.

main_function.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::cast
main_function.purpose: Execute Vividos' scripted ritual (Ceremony of Eternity): place avatar in stasis, pace camera/SFX/quake, spawn timed effect processes and NPCs, trigger animations and a single receiveHitWrapper call that appears to enact the 'sending' of Lothian to Lithos. Also supports an idle effect loop when no target is present.
entry_conditions: Invoked when Vividos' U8P_VIVIDOS::cast process runs (engine event).
Performs the full ritual only when Npc::getTarget(this) == 1 (i.e., Vividos is activated/targeted).
If no target, uses an internal counter (local1) to loop spawn FREE::func1C19 visual effects until a target appears.

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::cast
function_map.role: ceremony/ritual process (primary runtime entry for the ceremony)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func01D7
function_map.role: in-depth 'U8P_VIVIDOS::use' ritual/dialog sequence that centers camera, places avatar in stasis, plays SFX, spawns NPCs/effects and coordinates animations (detailed implementation of the ceremony invoked from menus)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func0F9D
function_map.role: timed two-stage animation helper: invokes METHOD::func15E7 twice on a target separated by spawning FREE::func1C19 and randomized delay

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::look
function_map.role: U8P_VIVIDOS::look/inspect process returning short name/bark depending on vividosMet

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule
function_map.role: behavior scheduler: builds U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule flags based on time-of-day and calls behavior methods to commit or test U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule (writes vividosSchedule on success)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry handler: resets stored refs and calls visual-state utilities based on vividosSchedule

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit cleanup: frees a stored reference (slot 0x0205)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func11E4
function_map.role: frame-inspection utility that may pathfind spawned NPCs, trigger animations (METHOD::func091C/METHOD::func15E7) or call flavor monologue U8P_VIVIDOS::func1352

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func1352
function_map.role: flavor monologue responder (proximity-aware, issues barks and accompanying animations/effects)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func1895
function_map.role: frame-inspection utility similar to U8P_VIVIDOS::func11E4 that conditionally pathfinds and calls U8P_VIVIDOS::func19CE or triggers METHOD::func15E7

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func19CE
function_map.role: alternate flavor monologue responder (distance-randomized bark set)

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::use
function_map.role: conversation entry (BeginConversation) that routes into menu/dialog flows and checks equipment/flags before delegating to U8P_VIVIDOS::func21F0 or U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func21F0
function_map.role: menu/dialog builder handling conversation branching, Ask/SuspendAssign/strcmp-driven choices and calling the ritual U8P_VIVIDOS::use (U8P_VIVIDOS::func01D7) for selected options

function_map.name: U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41
function_map.role: alternate/extended conversation builder that checks reagents/equipment, toggles haveReagents and can call the ritual U8P_VIVIDOS::use (U8P_VIVIDOS::func01D7)

internal_calls.purpose: Delegate to the menu-driven conversation flow when Lothian is alive
Delegate to alternate conversation flow when Lothian is dead
Trigger the in-depth ritual/ceremony sequence from a dialogue choice
Also trigger the ritual/ceremony from an alternate conversation branch (menu choice)
Emit flavor barks when pathfind/conditions indicate speaking is appropriate
Emit alternate flavor barks when pathfind/conditions indicate speaking is appropriate
Request short staged animations/actions on created NPCs/objects as part of the ceremony timing

external_calls.purpose: Check whether Vividos has been targeted/activated to decide whether to run the ritual
Freeze the player/avatar during the ritual
Create a dramatic screen-quake effect during the ceremony
Play the key sound effect at the ceremony's peak
Apply a hit/transition effect (appears to enact the 'sending' or health/transition change during the ritual)
Spawn and initialize NPCs and request their short animations/actions during the ritual
Drive a two-stage animation/effect sequence on a target with a randomized delay
Request pathfinding/movement for spawned actors and branch on the pathfind result to decide speech vs. non-verbal action
Compute proximity and choose randomized flavor barks and pacing spawns
Inspect player/NPC equipment to detect reagents, dagger, or other items that alter available menu options
Clear stored script reference slots when the player enters or leaves the fast-area (cleanup/registration management)

reads.name: vividosMet
reads.likely_effect: Choose U8P_VIVIDOS::look greeting and influence initial dialog wording/menu; indicates whether the player already met Vividos

reads.name: vivTold
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether to perform equipment check branch and whether haveDagger should be cleared/re-evaluated

reads.name: lothianDead
reads.likely_effect: Select which conversation flow to U8P_VIVIDOS::use (U8P_VIVIDOS::func21F0 vs U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41)

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: If true triggers an immediate angry monologue demanding the Heart of Earth be returned (alters conversation flow / ends conversation)

reads.name: vividosSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Controls which visual-state helper is invoked on area entry (0x02 -> U8P_VIVIDOS::func11E4, 0x01 -> U8P_VIVIDOS::func1895) and records committed U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule from U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule

reads.name: ceremonySoon
reads.likely_effect: If true, suppresses U8P_VIVIDOS::enterFastArea's reset/helper invocation (blocks certain area-entry behavior when ceremony is imminent)

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Used to avoid interrupting active speech; selects between speaking branch (call monologue helpers) and non-verbal action branch

reads.name: haveReagents
reads.likely_effect: Tracks whether required reagents were provided (used to enable reagent-turnin menu options)

reads.name: toldReagents
reads.likely_effect: Trigger whether the script inspects equipment for reagents during conversation

reads.name: isApprentice
reads.likely_effect: Affects available initial menu options (apprentice-specific dialogue)

reads.name: lithosMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to add 'I have met the Mountain King' option when true (affects menu construction)

reads.name: gotTheKey
reads.likely_effect: Used with lithosMet to control addition of a key-related menu option

reads.name: lothInterred
reads.likely_effect: Enables 'I have interred Lothian' menu option when true

reads.name: askToDo
reads.likely_effect: When set and reagents not done, adds a 'What must I do?' menu option

reads.name: openBirth
reads.likely_effect: When equal to 0x01 replaces menu with birthplace-related option

reads.name: haveReagentsDone
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating reagent-completion dialogue/options after reagents have been turned in

writes.name: haveDagger
writes.likely_effect: Set/cleared by U8P_VIVIDOS::use to reflect whether the player currently has the dagger (affects menu options)

writes.name: vividosMet
writes.likely_effect: Set when entering certain dialogue paths to mark that Vividos has been met (used for U8P_VIVIDOS::look/dialog welcome variations)

writes.name: haveReagents
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_VIVIDOS::func5D41 when both reagent-frame checks pass; enables reagent-specific menu options and completion flow

writes.name: vividosSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Written by U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule when process_result() indicates a committed U8P_VIVIDOS::schedule (controls later U8P_VIVIDOS::enterFastArea behavior)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Vividos' dialog, proximity behaviors, and a scripted ritual called the "Ceremony of Eternity" that can be executed to 'send' another character (Lothian) to the Mountain King (Lithos).
